task_completion.description: The agent opens the Google Earth application or website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Google Earth interface (globe view, sidebar, or splash screen) is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the specific coordinates into the search bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar contains the text '40.7128, -74.0060' (or very similar format).

task_completion.description: The agent initiates the search action.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search button is clicked, or a dropdown of search results appears showing the coordinates or 'New York'.

task_completion.description: The map view updates to show New York City.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displays the geography of Manhattan/New York City. Labels like 'New York', 'Manhattan', or 'City Hall Park' may be visible.

task_completion.description: The final view confirms the specific location with a pin or marker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pin, marker, or info card is displayed on the map identifying the location as New York, NY, corresponding to the input coordinates.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's search bar to navigate.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show text entry into the Google Earth search field, not URL manipulation or terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Google Earth software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Google Earth web or desktop UI, including navigation controls and map rendering.

integrity.description: The agent navigated directly to the coordinates within the map application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply perform a Google text search for the answer; the visual context is a map interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The coordinates 40.7128, -74.0060 correspond to New York City (Manhattan), specifically near City Hall Park. The VLM should expect to see a map view of this area.
